sample_data.FDTINFQ:
SELECT 
SK.STOK_KODU,
SK.STOK_ADI,
CONVERT(NVARCHAR,FLOOR(SUM(MIKTAR))) + ' / ' + CONVERT(NVARCHAR,FLOOR(SUM(SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR))) PLANLAMA_MIKTAR,
'X' ADRES,
CONVERT(NUMERIC(18,2),ISNULL((SELECT SUM(MIKTAR) FROM AMBARTAKIP WHERE STOK_REF=SH.STOK_REF AND AMBAR_KODU=SH.AMBAR_KODU AND TAKIP_NO=SH.TAKIP_NO HAVING SUM(MIKTAR)>0),0)) STOK_MIKTARI
FROM
PLANLAMAFISLERI SF 
LEFT OUTER JOIN PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI SH ON SF.PB_REF=SH.PB_REF
LEFT OUTER JOIN STOKKARTI SK ON SK.STOK_REF=SH.STOK_REF
WHERE
SF.PB_REF=@PB_REF
GROUP BY
SK.STOK_KODU,
SK.STOK_ADI,
SH.STOK_REF,
SH.AMBAR_KODU,
SH.TAKIP_NO,CARPAN2,CARPAN1
HAVING SUM(MIKTAR-SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR)>0

select 

SK.STOK_KODU,
SK.STOK_ADI,
CONVERT(NUMERIC(18,2),SUM(MIKTAR)) MIKTAR,
ADRES , 
CONVERT(NUMERIC(18,2),SUM(MIKTAR)) MIKTAR

FROM AMBARTAKIP AT , STOKKARTI SK 
WHERE AT.STOK_REF=SK.STOK_REF AND AT.AMBAR_KODU=0 AND AT.ADRES='X'

GROUP BY 
SK.STOK_KODU,
SK.STOK_ADI,
ADRES

HAVING SUM(MIKTAR)>0

SELECT 
SK.STOK_KODU,
SK.STOK_ADI,
CONVERT(NVARCHAR,FLOOR(SUM(MIKTAR))*CARPAN2/CARPAN1) + ' / ' + CONVERT(NVARCHAR,FLOOR(SUM(SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR))*CARPAN2/CARPAN1) PLANLAMA_MIKTAR,
--CONVERT(NVARCHAR,FLOOR(SUM(MIKTAR)))*CARPAN2/CARPAN1  SIPARIS_MIKTARI,
'X' ADRES,
ISNULL((SELECT SUM(MIKTAR) FROM AMBARTAKIP AT WHERE AT.STOK_REF=SH.STOK_REF AND AT.AMBAR_KODU=SH.AMBAR_KODU AND AT.ADRES='ONKABUL' HAVING SUM(MIKTAR)>0),0) STOK_MIKTARI
FROM
SIPARISFISLERI SF 
LEFT OUTER JOIN SIPARISHAREKETLERI SH ON SF.SB_REF=SH.SB_REF
LEFT OUTER JOIN STOKKARTI SK ON SK.STOK_REF=SH.STOK_REF
WHERE
SF.SB_REF=@SB_REF
GROUP BY
SK.STOK_KODU,
SK.STOK_ADI,
SH.STOK_REF,
SH.AMBAR_KODU,
SH.TAKIP_NO,
sh.CARPAN2,CARPAN1
HAVING SUM(MIKTAR-SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR)>0
sample_data.FDTINFAF:
DECLARE @KONT NVARCHAR(50) SET @KONT=(
SELECT  COUNT(*) FROM 
TIGER3..LG_123_01_INVOICE SF ,
TIGER3..LG_123_01_STLINE ST 
WHERE SF.LOGICALREF=ST.INVOICEREF 
AND ST.TRCODE IN (8,7)
AND ST.STOCKREF=@STOK_REF
AND SF.FICHENO COLLATE TURKISH_CI_AS =(SELECT TOP 1  BELGE_NO FROM STOKFISLERI  WHERE FB_REF=@FB_REF)
)

 IF @KONT<>0
BEGIN
SELECT MESAJ1='0' , MESAJ2='OK'
END
ELSE IF @KONT=0
BEGIN
SELECT MESAJ1='2' , MESAJ2='OKUTTUGUNUZ URUN BU SATIS FATURASINDA YOK !'
END
sample_data.FDTINFBF:
UPDATE STOKHAREKETLERI SET IADE_REF=(
SELECT SH.LOGICALREF FROM TIGER3..LG_123_01_STFICHE ST , TIGER3..LG_123_01_STLINE SH  
WHERE ST.INVOICEREF=(SELECT  LOGICALREF  FROM TIGER3..LG_123_01_INVOICE 
WHERE FICHENO  COLLATE TURKISH_CI_AS =(SELECT TOP 1  BELGE_NO FROM STOKFISLERI  WHERE FB_REF=@FB_REF))
AND ST.LOGICALREF=SH.STFICHEREF 
AND SH.STOCKREF=(SELECT TOP 1  STOK_REF FROM STOKHAREKETLERI WHERE FD_REF=@FD_REF)
)
WHERE FD_REF=@FD_REF
sample_data.FBTINFAF:
DECLARE @KONT NVARCHAR(50) SET @KONT=(
SELECT  COUNT(*) FROM 
TIGER3..LG_123_01_INVOICE SF 
WHERE  SF.TRCODE IN (8,7)
AND SF.FICHENO=@BELGE_NO
)

IF @BELGE_NO=''
BEGIN
SELECT MESAJ1='2' , MESAJ2='BELGE NO BOS GECILEMEZ !'
END

ELSE IF @KONT<>0
BEGIN
SELECT MESAJ1='0' , MESAJ2='OK'
END
ELSE IF @KONT=0
BEGIN
SELECT MESAJ1='2' , MESAJ2='GECERLI BIR IRSALIYE NUMARASI GIRMEDINIZ !'
END

sample_data.FDTINFQ:
SELECT 
SK.STOK_KODU,
SK.STOK_ADI,
CONVERT(NVARCHAR,FLOOR(SUM(MIKTAR))*CARPAN2/CARPAN1) + ' / ' + CONVERT(NVARCHAR,FLOOR(SUM(SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR))*CARPAN2/CARPAN1) PLANLAMA_MIKTAR,
--CONVERT(NVARCHAR,FLOOR(SUM(MIKTAR)))*CARPAN2/CARPAN1  SIPARIS_MIKTARI,
'X' ADRES,
ISNULL((SELECT SUM(MIKTAR) FROM AMBARTAKIP AT WHERE AT.STOK_REF=SH.STOK_REF AND AT.AMBAR_KODU=SH.AMBAR_KODU AND AT.ADRES='ONKABUL' HAVING SUM(MIKTAR)>0),0) STOK_MIKTARI
FROM
SIPARISFISLERI SF 
LEFT OUTER JOIN SIPARISHAREKETLERI SH ON SF.SB_REF=SH.SB_REF
LEFT OUTER JOIN STOKKARTI SK ON SK.STOK_REF=SH.STOK_REF
WHERE
SF.SB_REF=@SB_REF
GROUP BY
SK.STOK_KODU,
SK.STOK_ADI,
SH.STOK_REF,
SH.AMBAR_KODU,
SH.TAKIP_NO,
sh.CARPAN2,CARPAN1
HAVING SUM(MIKTAR-SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR)>0
sample_data.FTPESCCBF: UPDATE STOKHAREKETLERI SET PROJE_REF=(select  PROJE_REF FROM STOKFISLERI WHERE FB_REF=@FB_REF) WHERE FB_REF=@FB_REF

sample_data.FDTINFBF:
UPDATE STOKHAREKETLERI SET IADE_REF=(
SELECT TOP 1  SH.LOGICALREF FROM TIGER3..LG_123_01_STFICHE ST , TIGER3..LG_123_01_STLINE SH   WHERE ST.DOCODE COLLATE TURKISH_CI_AS=(SELECT TOP 1  BELGE_NO FROM STOKFISLERI  WHERE FB_REF=@FB_REF)
AND ST.LOGICALREF=SH.STFICHEREF 
AND SH.STOCKREF=(SELECT TOP 1  STOK_REF FROM STOKHAREKETLERI WHERE FD_REF=@FD_REF)
)
WHERE FD_REF=@FD_REF
sample_data.FBTINFAF:
DECLARE @KONT NVARCHAR(50) SET @KONT=(
SELECT  COUNT(*) FROM 
TIGER3..LG_123_01_STFICHE SF ,
TIGER3..LG_123_01_STLINE ST 
WHERE SF.LOGICALREF=ST.STFICHEREF 
AND ST.TRCODE=1
AND SF.DOCODE=@BELGE_NO
)

IF @BELGE_NO=''
BEGIN
SELECT MESAJ1='2' , MESAJ2='BELGE NO BOS GECILEMEZ !'
END

ELSE IF @KONT<>0
BEGIN
SELECT MESAJ1='0' , MESAJ2='OK'
END
ELSE IF @KONT=0
BEGIN
SELECT MESAJ1='2' , MESAJ2='GECERLI BIR IRSALIYE NUMARASI GIRMEDINIZ !'
END

sample_data.FDTINFQ:
SELECT

SK.STOK_KODU,
SK.STOK_ADI,
SUM(MIKTAR) AS MIKTAR,
CASE WHEN ISNULL((SELECT FLOOR(SUM(MIKTAR)) FROM AMBARTAKIP AT  WHERE AT.STOK_REF=SH.STOK_REF AND AMBAR_KODU=5 AND AT.DURUM_KODU=(SELECT P.PROJE_KODU FROM PROJE P WHERE P.PROJE_REF=SF.PROJE_REF)),'0')=0
THEN 'TOPLANMAMIS !  ' ELSE 'OK' END  , 
ISNULL((SELECT FLOOR(SUM(MIKTAR)) FROM AMBARTAKIP AT  WHERE AT.STOK_REF=SH.STOK_REF AND AMBAR_KODU=5 AND AT.DURUM_KODU=(SELECT P.PROJE_KODU FROM PROJE P WHERE P.PROJE_REF=SF.PROJE_REF)),'0')  PROJE_STOK

FROM 
SIPARISFISLERI SF , 
SIPARISHAREKETLERI SH , 
STOKKARTI SK,
STOKBIRIM SB

WHERE SF.SB_REF=SH.SB_REF 
AND SH.STOK_REF=SK.STOK_REF
AND SF.SB_REF=@SB_REF
AND SB.BIRIM_REF=SH.BIRIM_REF

GROUP BY 
STOK_KODU,
STOK_ADI,
SF.PROJE_REF,
SH.STOK_REF

HAVING SUM(MIKTAR)-SUM(SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR)>0
